hero.title: About GroveX
hero.subtitle: Azerbaijan's first international-level agronomy consultancy specialized in tomato greenhouses.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To bring Azerbaijan's greenhouse sector to world standards. To increase local producers' yield, quality, and export competitiveness.

items.title: Accountability for results
items.text: Every package is tied to measurable targets. We deliver results.

items.title: International knowledge, local application
items.text: Putting Dutch, Belgian, and Japanese expertise to work in Azerbaijani conditions.

items.title: Transparency and reliability
items.text: Every recommendation is grounded in analysis and field data. We speak in numbers, without commentary.

whyNow.title: Why Now?
whyNow.text: Azerbaijan's greenhouse sector has gained access to technology — but the system gap of turning that technology into operational greenhouse processes remains. GroveX fills precisely this gap.
